name: Christopher Fleming
description:
[TW: Weight Gain/Feederism, boy failure, and usual shenanigans (this guy is into sweat and shi)]

Very recommended to not go blind, since this bot has I guess complex motivations ;3

For God knows how long, you started to notice weird, small packages on your doormat every morning, each and every one of them being just innocent homemade pastries. Whatever you decided to do with them, one morning you noticed the usual small present of sweets not being on your doormat, an unusual step away from the routine. But in the afternoon of the same day, you heard someone before your door, it turned out to be your…quite unique neighbour, holding in his hand what it looked like one of the treats you were given each morning, claiming he just “found it there”. Odd…

Art made with the use of pixAI :3

Fun fact! This guy was much more sick, confident and twisted in my drafts. Like, not even caring if the user is in pain or stuff… Which is why he is kind of similar to Zeke now, but with a completely different motivation ig. If anyone would be interested in complete sicko Chris was beforehand, ig let me know? Maybe I will post it as an alt ;3

Few yummy tags: Feeder, comfort.
creator: ratmania
